title: Policy decision
description: Emitted by each control package for a single evaluation. A deny always carries exactly one violation_code, selected by an explicit precedence order so output is deterministic when several violations apply at once; the complete set remains available at <package>.violations.

allow.description: False when any violation applies. Defaults to false; the engine fails closed.

control_id.description: The assigned control outcome that produced this decision.

resource_id.description: Identifier of the evaluated asset or exception, carried through from input.

violation_code.description: Present only when allow is false.

violationCode.description: Closed vocabulary of violation outcomes. Codes are grouped by control and ordered within each control by the precedence used to select the primary violation.
